creator: rodrigc@FreeBSD.org
text:
If I execute this command:

pkg install subversion

then 'pkg' will try to install multiple versions of subversion.

See posting by claudiu vasadi: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2013-November/075731.html


From some discussions on the mailing lists with Baptiste,
Baptiste would like to see that

(1) PKGNAME must be unique in the ports tree
(2) LATEST_LINK can be used to work around the problem, but
the ideal solution would be to fix PKGNAME

This is similar to:
PR 183452
PR 183453
